articles.title: Dow loses more than 500 points Friday as tech slumps and yields spike: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: Stocks fell on Friday, bogged down by losses in technology stocks and a rise in U.S. Treasury yields.
articles.content: Stocks fell on Friday, bogged down by losses in technology stocks and a rise in U.S. Treasury yields, after a summit between President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinpingended and left trad… [+3014 chars]
